name: UNIX Symbolic Link (Symlink) Following
description: The product opens a file or directory without sufficiently accounting for the possibility that it is a symbolic link resolving to a target outside the intended control sphere, allowing attackers to read, write, or delete unintended files.
detection_pattern: INGRESS or TRANSFORM node provides a filename that may be a symlink, which flows to STORAGE[file_open] without a CONTROL node that uses lstat() to detect symlinks, O_NOFOLLOW to prevent following, or realpath() to validate the resolved target remains within the restricted directory
